channel.title: 未解决bug on Sorryfu Site
channel.description: Recent content in 未解决bug on Sorryfu Site

item.title: fragment has not been attached yet
item.description: 问题描述 recreate之后fragment has not been attached yet 2021-01-14 21:56:18.796 6790-6790/com.fushaolei.project_android W/System.err: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Fragment HomeFragment{e7339f (41a0caf3-9453-416a-afca-b16aff063bfa)} has not been attached yet. 2021-01-14 21:56:18.796 6790-6790/com.fushaolei.project_android W/System.err: at androidx.fragment.app.Fragment.getChildFragmentManager(Fragment.java:923) 场景：在进行日夜间模式切换的时候会用到recreate重启Activity，然后因为有一个fragment里又嵌套这viewpager，需要用到getChildFragmentManager（时机是在frament生命周期onViewCreated()中进行的）。如上，recreate发生了报错 点进getChildFragmentManager后你会发现 给👴整自闭了 推荐阅读 Android提升篇系列：Activity recreate(Activity 重新创建/自我恢复)机制（一） Fragment官方文档 问题解决：Fragment not attached to Activity Android 基礎的 Fragment 使用方式
